overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through rural countryside. The character passes stone ruins, crosses a stream, and walks along railway tracks while a horse-drawn carriage passes by. The lighting transitions from overcast to bright morning sun with visible god rays.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a ruined stone structure

entered.detail: collapsed stone wall with broken wooden roof beams
scattered oak trees throughout the meadow
lush green grass with white wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an overcast meadow with dense tall grass and wildflowers. A ruined stone structure stands to the left as the camera moves forward through the scattered trees.

events.description: sun breaks through clouds creating bright god rays and changing the atmosphere from overcast to sunny
character approaches and crosses a shallow rocky stream

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit grass and crossing a small stream with stone walls

entered.detail: shallow water with rocky banks and stepping stones
low rock wall running alongside the stream
rusted train tracks running through the meadow

segments.scene_description: The lighting shifts dramatically to bright morning sun as the character crosses a shallow stream bordered by stone walls. Railway tracks become visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural railway track through grassy countryside

events.description: horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the tracks

agents.ego_description: walking along the railway tracks as a carriage approaches and passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the tracks toward the character, passing by closely on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path with railway tracks as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. The scene is bathed in warm morning sunlight with trees lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a muted rural meadow that gradually transforms into a sun-drenched countryside landscape. It begins with the character walking through dense tall grass and wildflowers under an overcast sky, passing a ruined stone structure nestled among scattered trees. As the character crosses a shallow stream bordered by stone walls, the lighting shifts dramatically from gray to bright morning sun, revealing railway tracks in the distance. The scene then opens onto a dirt path alongside the tracks, where the environment is bathed in warm light and lined with trees. Finally, the camera follows the character as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from the distance and passes by on the left.
